steps.prompt: See that switch? Tap switch A!
steps.feedback: The lamp lights up! You turned switch A on.

steps.prompt: Now tap switch A again — turn it off.
steps.feedback: The lamp went out. Switch off, lamp off!

steps.prompt: There's another switch — switch B. What do you think happens when you turn it on?
steps.feedback: Hmm — B is on but the lamp is still out! This gate needs both switches.
Both on — the lamp lights up! This gate needs both switches. It's called an AND gate!
